name: Poppy Strike 4
description: Poppy Strike 4 is a horror shooter game where you are trapped in a spooky toy factory and your mission is to find the exit on each level and shoot all huggy wuggy on your way.
instructions: WASD - Move LMB - Shoot RMB - Aim Flashlight Space - Jump R - Reload G - Grenade F - Use C - Crouch
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Action, Adventure, First Person Shooter, Horror, huggy, Poppy Playtime, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Unity3D
